description_long: This bungalow features a single-story structure with a prominent, dark gray hip roof and light-colored exterior walls. The front area includes a spacious porch with outdoor seating, while the surrounding landscape is lush with various trees and shrubs, creating a welcoming and private atmosphere. The backyard appears to have a patio area with additional seating and a small pool or water feature, enhancing the outdoor living space. Windows are arranged symmetrically on the front facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The house is surrounded by a well-maintained garden, with pathways and decorative landscaping elements visible from multiple angles. The overall design is modern yet cozy, ideal for suburban or residential neighborhood settings.
description: A single-story bungalow with a dark hip roof, light walls, a front porch, and lush landscaped surroundings. Features include symmetrical front windows, a backyard patio, and a small pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the porch, main entrance, outdoor seating, and lush landscaping with several trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the hip roof, side windows, and a landscaped pathway leading to the backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, small pool or water feature, and dense tree coverage.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the side and partial front, with visible porch, garden, and outdoor living areas.
